race.comment: COLONEL BOGEY (2) was having first try at course and distance and wound up strongly to finish runner-up. Much fitter for the first run off a long break and can go one better. COOL AS YOU (3) was well fancied last start over 1350m at this track over a bit further but could manage only sixth, beaten 3.5 lengths. Can bounce back over this journey. EQUIVASTER (10) is a former Victorian who is making her debut in this area. Has trialled well and her best figures measure right up. Looks well-placed with the claim. GUBER (5) ran a better race last start to finish second at this track over 1350m. Has been winding up late and looks a top chance.
